actor-start.eventDescription: Flat fee charged once per run, covers session warmup.

job-listing.eventDescription: One Indeed listing extracted from a search/results page.

job-listing-with-details.eventDescription: Listing enriched via the detail page (full description, requirements, external apply link).

company-enriched.eventDescription: Company page visited once per run to attach rating, reviews count, HQ, size, industry.
